title: Red Plastic Battery Operated Hi-Visibility Pet Safety Flasher (3 cm x 5 cm) 1 Piece - Water-Resistant, 2 Bright LEDs, Perfect for All Pets
features: ENANCED VISIBILITY FOR PET SAFETY: Ensure your furry friend is seen and safe during night walks with our red battery operated hi-visibility pet safety flasher. Designed to be visible for up to 1/2 mile, it's perfect for evening or early morning jogs.

ROBUST-WATER RESISTANT: Crafted with durability in mind, this pet flasher is made from high-quality plastic and metal materials, offering water resistance that stands up to any weather condition your adventures might face.

EASY-TO CLIP CONVENIENCE: This compact (3 cm x 5 cm) safety accessory easily clips onto dog collars, leashes, or harnesses, making it an effortless addition to your pet's outdoor gear. It's designed for hassle-free attachment and removal.

UNIVERSAL PET SAFETY SOLUTION: Our hi-visibility pet safety flasher isn't just for dogs; it's suitably designed for all pets. Whether you have a small kitten or a large breed dog, this flasher is the perfect companion to keep them visible and safe.

BRIGHT DUAL LED LIGHTS: Equipped with two bright LEDs, our pet safety flasher cuts through the darkness, producing a flashing light that alerts motorists and pedestrians to your pet's presence, enhancing safety and peace of mind.
description: Product Description This battery-operated Hi-visibility Pet Safety Flasher easily clips onto dog collars to produce a bright flashing light that can be visible for up to 1/2 mile. Safety Warning No warning applicable
